zh.lifeSummary: 當Ponce de CABRERA於1152年出生在西班牙卡塔倫亞比斯巴特 德 赫羅納時，他的父親Guerau III de Cabrera23歲，母親Berenguela Fodd de Queralt14歲。他於大約1179年與Marquesa de Urgel在西班牙卡塔倫亞萊里達利爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1199年1月23日享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ponce de CABRERA于1152年出生在西班牙卡塔倫亞比斯巴特 德 赫羅納时，他的父亲Guerau III de Cabrera23岁，母亲Berenguela Fodd de Queralt14岁。他于大约1179年与Marquesa de Urgel在西班牙卡塔倫亞萊里達利爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1199年1月23日享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: CABRERA
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Carlos, Manuel, Jorge, Francisco, Rafael, Jesus, Pedro, Miguel, Ramon.  Portuguese Lidio, Wenceslao, Anatolio, Joao, Ligia, Marcio.
Catalan and Spanish: habitational name from any of various minor places called Cabrera, from Late Latin capraria ‘place of goats’ (from Latin capra ‘goat’).

variants.name: Cabrerra
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Catalan and Spanish   Cabrera  .

nameMeanings.name: Ponce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Juan, Luis, Jesus, Carlos, Francisco, Jorge, Miguel, Pedro, Raul, Roberto.

Spanish and French: from the medieval personal name Ponce, ultimately from Pontius, a Roman surname, perhaps an ethnic name for someone from Pontus (named from Greek pontos ‘ocean’) in Asia Minor, or an Italic cognate of Latin Quintus ‘fifth’ (i.e. ‘fifth-born’). The name was borne by two 3rd-century Christian saints, a Carthaginian deacon and a martyr of Nice, but was not widely popular in the Middle Ages because of the inhibiting influence of the even more famous Pontius Pilate. In some cases though, the surname may have been originally used for someone who had played the part of this character in a religious play.

variants.name: Ponce de Leon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Luis, Cesar, Mercedes, Alberto, Francisco, Javier, Juan, Lazaro, Leticia, Manuel, Ramon.
Spanish (Ponce de León): compound of the surname Ponce + the habitational name León (see Leon ).

History: Juan Ponce De León, the Spanish explorer who discovered Florida, came from a noble Aragonese family. He is believed to have been on board for Columbus's second voyage to Hispaniola in 1493. After his death in Florida from a wound from an Indian arrow in 1521, Ponce De León's title and rights in Florida were passed on to his son.

variants.name: Points
meanings: English (of Norman origin):
from the Old French personal name Ponz, Ponce, from Latin Pontius (see Ponce ).

habitational name from any of several places called Ponts (such as those in Manche and in Seine-Maritime, Normandy), from Latin pontes ‘bridges’. This name has been established since the 13th century in Ireland, where it appears as Pounce and Pounche, and is Gaelicized as Púinse.

variants.name: Pons
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Pedro, Ramon, Guillermo, Roberto, Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Mario, Rafael, Apolonia.  French Adrien, Armand, Emile, Jacques, Marcel, Marcelle, Matilde.
Catalan, French (Occitan), and Dutch: from the medieval personal name Pons (see Ponce ).
German: patronymic from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name, such as Bonhard, formed with the element bon ‘request, petition’ (compare Latin bonus).

variants.name: Ponzio
meanings: From Latin Pontius, a family name of uncertain origin.

variants.name: Poncelet
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Benoit.  German Erwin, Fritz.
French (mainly northeastern) and Walloon:
topographic name from a diminutive of Old French poncel ‘little bridge’, or a habitational name from (Le) Poncelet, the name of several places in the northeastern part of France.

variants.name: Poinsett
meanings: Altered form of French Poinset: from a pet form of the personal name Poinse, from Latin Pontius (see Ponce ). Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t. The surname Poinset is very rare in France.

History: The poinsettia takes its name from an American diplomat, Joel Poinsett (1779–1851), who was a keen amateur botanist and who brought the flower back from Mexico, where he was US ambassador. He was born in Charleston, SC, and was descended from a Huguenot, Pierre Poinset, who was born in Soubise in Charente-Maritime and settled in Charleston c. 1700. Pierre Poinset is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar registers of the Huguenot Society of America and of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Point
meanings: French: from the personal name Point, from Latin Pontius (see Ponce ).
English: variant of Points with loss of final -s. This surname is rare in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Ponce de CABRERA was born in 1152, in Diocese of Girona, Catalonia, Spain, his father, Guerau III de Cabrera, was 23 and his mother, Berenguela Fodd de Queralt, was 14. He married Marquesa de Urgel about 1179, in l'Urgell, Lleida, Catalonia, Spain. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 23 January 1199, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ponce de CABRERA est né en 1152, à Bisbat de Girona, Catalunya, Espagne, son père, Guerau III de Cabrera, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Berenguela Fodd de Queralt, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Marquesa de Urgel environ 1179, à l'Urgell, Lleida, Catalunya, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 23 janvier 1199, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ponce de CABRERA 1152 in Bisbat de Girona, Catalunya, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guerau III de Cabrera 23 und seine Mutter Berenguela Fodd de Queralt 14. Er hat um 1179 in l'Urgell, Lleida, Catalunya, Spanien Marquesa de Urgel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 23. Januar 1199 im Alter von 47 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ponce de CABRERA è nato il nel 1152 nel Bisbat de Girona, Catalunya, Spagna, il suo padre, Guerau III de Cabrera, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Berenguela Fodd de Queralt, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Marquesa de Urgel circa 1179, nel l'Urgell, Lleida, Catalunya, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 23 gennaio 1199, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ponce de CABRERAが1152年にスペインカタルニーアビスバト ド ギロナで生まれた時，父Guerau III de Cabreraは23歳，母Berenguela Fodd de Queraltは14歳であった。約1179年にスペインカタルニーアレイダル'ウルジェルでMarquesa de Urgelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1199年1月23日に47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ponce de CABRERA(이)가 1152년 스페인 카털니아 비스바트 데 지로나에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guerau III de Cabrera(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Berenguela Fodd de Queralt(은)는 14세였다. 그는 대략 1179년 스페인 카털니아 레이다 '르그에서 Marquesa de Urgel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1199년 1월 23일 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ponce de CABRERA nasceu em 1152, em Bisbat de Girona, Catalunya, Espanha, seu pai, Guerau III de Cabrera, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Berenguela Fodd de Queralt, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Marquesa de Urgel aproximadamente 1179, em l'Urgell, Lleida, Catalunya, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 23 de janeiro de 1199, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ponce de CABRERA родился в 1152 г. в местности бисбат де гирона, каталуня, Испания, его отцу по имени Guerau III de Cabrera было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Berenguela Fodd de Queralt, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Marquesa de Urgel около 1179 г. в местности л'ургелл, ллида, каталуня, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 23 января 1199 г. в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ponce de CABRERA nació en 1152, en Diócesis de Gerona, Cataluña, España, su papá, Guerau III de Cabrera, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Berenguela Fodd de Queralt, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Marquesa de Urgel aproximadamente 1179, en Urgel, Lérida, Cataluña, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 23 de enero de 1199, a la edad de 47 años.
